mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_permit_renewal WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN current_expiry IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, current_expiry ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_permit_renewal WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_renewal WHERE deleted = 0 AND stage = #{stage}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_renewal WHERE deleted = 0 AND stage <> N'완료'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_renewal WHERE deleted = 0 AND stage = N'완료'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_permit_renewal ( permit_name, category, stage, current_expiry, target_date, start_date, assignee, next_action, due_date, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{permitName}, #{category,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{stage}N'검토', #{currentExpiry,jdbcType=DATE}, #{targetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{assignee,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{nextAction,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_permit_renewal SET permit_name = #{permitName}, category = #{category,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, stage = #{stage}, current_expiry = #{currentExpiry,jdbcType=DATE}, target_date = #{targetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, assignee = #{assignee,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, next_action = #{nextAction,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, due_date = #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_permit_renewal SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
